Solanum robustum, commonly known as Solori robusta, is a plant species in the Solanaceae family, which comprises a wide range of flowering plants, including potatoes, tomatoes, and eggplants. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Solanum robustum include glycosides, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
